libraries.name: Lucius Beebe (Wakefield)
libraries.notes: NOBLE network. Free card for any MA resident with photo ID + proof of address. Open to all patrons with a Wakefield/NOBLE library card.

libraries.name: Boston Public Library
libraries.notes: Open to any MA resident. eCard issued online for digital resources only — physical card (free, in person at any branch) required for museum passes.

libraries.name: Stoneham Public Library
libraries.notes: NOBLE network. Free card for any MA resident with photo ID + proof of address. Non-NOBLE cards can also be added. Available to all patrons in good standing.

libraries.name: Reading Public Library
libraries.notes: NOBLE network. Free card for any MA resident. One pass per family per day; most passes once per calendar month.

libraries.name: Woburn Public Library
libraries.notes: Museum passes restricted to Woburn residents only — even network cardholders cannot reserve. Passes restricted to Woburn residents only.

libraries.name: Lynnfield Public Library
libraries.notes: Free card for any MA resident. eCard must be upgraded to full-access (in person) before reserving museum passes. Passes funded by Friends of the Lynnfield Library.

libraries.name: Peabody Institute Library
libraries.notes: NOBLE network. Free card for any MA resident with proof of address. Available to Peabody and NOBLE network cardholders.

libraries.name: Melrose Public Library
libraries.notes: Passes restricted to Melrose residents (limited exception for City of Melrose staff/retirees). One pass per household per day; reservations up to 30 days in advance.

libraries.name: Winchester Public Library
libraries.notes: Passes available to Winchester residents only (with a Minuteman card). One household = 2 passes/week. Passes restricted to Winchester residents only. Specific cost details not published online; visit page for booking.

libraries.name: Saugus Public Library
libraries.notes: NOBLE network. Any NOBLE card in good standing can reserve. ParksPass also requires MA residency. Funded by the New Friends of the Saugus Public Library.

libraries.name: Malden Public Library
libraries.notes: Anyone (MA resident) can get a Malden card, but museum-pass program is restricted to Malden residents only. Passes for Malden residents; one pass per family per 7 days.

libraries.name: Medford Public Library
libraries.notes: Museum passes generally tied to Medford residents / home library — non-residents should call to confirm. Funded by the Friends of the Medford Public Library.

libraries.name: Burlington Public Library
libraries.notes: MVLC network. Any MVLC cardholder can reserve. Non-MVLC need Burlington work/school/property to get a card. One pass per family per day; same pass once per family per month.

libraries.name: Flint Memorial Library (North Reading)
libraries.notes: NOBLE network (Flint Memorial). Any NOBLE cardholder can reserve passes; pickup at 1st-floor circulation. Pickup at circulation desk on the 1st floor unless otherwise noted.

libraries.name: Wilmington Memorial Library
libraries.notes: MVLC network. MA residents from certified towns can get a free MVLC eCard online via Wilmington — full-service, can reserve passes. Non-MVLC residents only get 30-day temp card. Passes purchased with town funds plus support from Wilmington Sons of Italy, We're One Wilmington, Community Fund, and Wilmington Arts Council. MVLC card required; cannot reserve with $20+ in fines.

benefits.name: Boston Children's Museum
benefits.booking_note: After getting library coupon, book Half Price Library Timed Tickets on bostonchildrensmuseum.org.

benefits.name: Museum of Science (Boston)
benefits.booking_note: Advance tickets recommended; weekends/holidays often sell out (mos.org).

benefits.name: New England Aquarium
benefits.booking_note: Advance timed tickets strongly recommended; capacity-limited (neaq.org).

benefits.name: Zoo New England (Stone Zoo & Franklin Park Zoo)
benefits.booking_note: Walk-in OK; show $9/$6 library voucher at gate.

benefits.name: Discovery Museum (Acton)
benefits.booking_note: Reservations no longer required; show pass at admissions desk.

benefits.name: Mass Audubon
benefits.booking_note: Show pass at sanctuary entrance; closed Mondays at most sites.

benefits.name: North Shore Children's Museum (Peabody)
benefits.booking_note: Online ticket reservation strongly encouraged due to capacity (nschildrensmuseum.org).

benefits.name: EcoTarium (Worcester)
benefits.booking_note: Walk-in OK; closed Mondays except Monday holidays.

benefits.name: USS Constitution Museum
benefits.booking_note: Walk-in; show pass at admission desk. Ship closed Mon–Tue.

benefits.name: Harvard Museums of Science & Culture
benefits.booking_note: Show physical pass + MA residency proof at admissions; no online booking.

benefits.name: Plimoth Patuxet Museums
benefits.booking_note: Seasonal: closed Dec–Mar; reopens for 2026 season through Sun after Thanksgiving.

benefits.name: The Butterfly Place (Westford)
benefits.booking_note: Open seasonally Valentine's Day–Columbus Day; walk-in, no reservation needed.

benefits.name: Davis Farmland
benefits.booking_note: Open Apr–Oct only; walk-in tickets at gate; closed Mon/Tue.

benefits.name: The Children's Piazza
benefits.booking_note: Must book open-play slot on thechildrenspiazza.com after getting library pass.

benefits.name: Einstein's Workshop
benefits.booking_note: Drop-in only Sat/Sun. No reservation needed; show library pass at door.

benefits.name: Sandmagination
benefits.booking_note: Advance tickets recommended esp. on vacation weeks (sandmagination.com).

benefits.name: Aviation Museum of New Hampshire
benefits.booking_note: Walk-in during posted hours; show pass at door.

benefits.name: American Heritage Museum (Hudson)
benefits.booking_note: Walk-in OK; bring pass to admissions desk. Tank rides require separate booking.

benefits.name: Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame
benefits.booking_note: Walk-in; closed Mondays (except select holidays). Show pass at door.

benefits.name: Patriots Hall of Fame
benefits.booking_note: Walk-in; closed Thanksgiving/Christmas/Easter & some private events.

benefits.name: Boston by Foot
benefits.booking_note: Public tours run Apr–Nov; advance registration required (bostonbyfoot.org).

benefits.name: Boston Harbor Islands
benefits.booking_note: Ferry runs May–Oct; reserve discounted ferry tickets via promo code/online.

benefits.name: Museum of Fine Arts (Boston)
benefits.booking_note: Use library promo code on mfa.org to redeem $10–$15 timed-entry tickets.

benefits.name: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
benefits.booking_note: After getting library promo code, book timed slot on gardnermuseum.org.

benefits.name: Institute of Contemporary Art (ICA)
benefits.booking_note: Use $10 e-coupon code from library to book online at icaboston.org.

benefits.name: Peabody Essex Museum
benefits.booking_note: After getting library promo code, book online at pem.org for $12 admission.

benefits.name: JFK Library & Museum
benefits.booking_note: Timed tickets recommended; drop-in admission also available (jfklibrary.org).

benefits.name: Concord Museum
benefits.booking_note: Walk-in OK; no reservation needed. Closed Mon (open Mon holidays).

benefits.name: Harvard Art Museums
benefits.booking_note: Free admission for everyone; walk-in. Closed Mondays.

benefits.name: House of the Seven Gables
benefits.booking_note: Timed-entry guided tours; book in advance on 7gables.org. No late arrivals.

benefits.name: Salem Witch Museum
benefits.booking_note: Timed 30-min presentations every half-hour; book online at salemwitchmuseum.com.

benefits.name: Historic New England
benefits.booking_note: Most properties require reserved guided tour; check property page on historicnewengland.org.

benefits.name: Wenham Museum
benefits.booking_note: Walk-in OK; closed Sun/Mon/Tue. First Wed open til 6.

benefits.name: New England Quilt Museum
benefits.booking_note: Walk-in OK; closed Sun/Mon. Group tours need 2-week advance booking.

benefits.name: New England Botanic Garden at Tower Hill
benefits.booking_note: Walk-in OK; show pass at admissions. Closed major holidays.

benefits.name: Garden in the Woods
benefits.booking_note: Open seasonally mid-Apr–mid-Oct; walk-in OK during season.

benefits.name: Gore Place
benefits.hours_summary: Mansion tours Mon, Wed, Fri, Sat
benefits.booking_note: Guided mansion tours on the hour; walk-ins welcome. Grounds open dawn–dusk daily.

benefits.name: Griffin Museum of Photography
benefits.booking_note: Walk-in OK; closed Mondays. Thursdays free admission.

benefits.name: Paul Revere House
benefits.booking_note: Walk-in self-guided tour; closed Mondays Jan–Mar.

benefits.name: Royall House and Slave Quarters
benefits.booking_note: Open Sat/Sun only, Jun–Oct; guided tours on the hour. Reserve for groups.

benefits.name: Paddle Boston
benefits.booking_note: Walk-up rentals OK Apr–Oct; reservations available but not required.

benefits.name: Trustees of Reservations
benefits.booking_note: Show pass at gate; some sites need timed parking reservation in summer.

benefits.name: MA State Parks (DCR ParkPass)
benefits.booking_note: Drive in and display ParkPass hangtag.

benefits.name: Greater Boston Stage Company
benefits.booking_note: Book specific performance via box office; library pass for select shows.

benefits.name: Merrimack Repertory Theatre
benefits.booking_note: Book specific performance via mrt.org; advance booking required.

benefits.name: American Repertory Theater
benefits.booking_note: Email ticketservices@amrep.org with library pass to claim 2 tickets to a show.

benefits.name: Greenway Carousel
benefits.booking_note: Walk-up only at booth; peak daily mid-Apr–mid-Oct, weekends til Frostival.

benefits.name: Mary Baker Eddy Library / Mapparium
benefits.booking_note: Timed 20-min tour every 20 min; book ticket time at marybakereddylibrary.org.

benefits.name: Larz Anderson Auto Museum
benefits.booking_note: Walk-in; show pass at door. Closed Mondays.

benefits.name: Revolutionary Spaces (Old State House)
benefits.booking_note: Walk-in OK at Old State House & Old South Meeting House; show physical pass.

benefits.name: Sandwich Glass Museum
benefits.booking_note: Walk-in; show library pass at door for 50% off. Closed Jan.

benefits.name: Boch Center Tours
benefits.booking_note: Backstage tours by reservation only via Peek.com; use library coupon code.

jfk-library.note: 50% off one admission with library card

mass-audubon.note: 1-day pass up to 4 people; some sites $2/person over age 2

trustees-of-reservations.note: varies by location, 2 adults + kids under 18

greater-boston-stage.note: varies by show, up to 12 tickets

mfa.note: $15 adults, $10 kids (2 adults + up to 4 kids)

harvard-museums.note: Harvard Museum of Natural History, up to 4

boston-childrens-museum.note: Winchester residents only; specific cost not published

harvard-museums.note: Harvard Museum of Natural History, 4 people

ma-state-parks.note: must pick up day before/morning of
free parking hangtag, one per month

mapparium.note: up to 4 adults; under 17 always free

museum-of-science.note: free exhibit halls, up to 4 (BPL is FREE vs half-price elsewhere)

new-england-aquarium.note: free admission, up to 4 (BPL is FREE vs half-price elsewhere)

sandwich-glass.note: 50% off, up to 2 adults; no booking required

paddle-boston.note: 1 boat rental (1-5 ppl depending on vessel)

zoo-new-england.note: $9 adult / $6 child, up to 6, one booking/month
